## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Rider app
- [ ] Driver app
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Website
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tooling

## Verification

List commands run, screenshots captured, or manual checks performed.

## Risk

Call out any impact to auth, OTP, payments, dispatch, safety, privacy, data
migrations, build/release, or production configuration.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] I agree to `CONTRIBUTOR_LICENSE_TERMS.md`.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, real user data, or production credentials.
- [ ] I updated docs for setup, API, env, or behavior changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where practical.
